auth.title: Customer login
auth.masterToggle: Allow customers to create accounts and sign in
auth.masterToggleHelp: When off, your site behaves like a brochure site with no login surface area. Guest checkout still works.
compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.deletions.title: Pending deletion requests
compliance.confirm.title: Confirm deletion now?
compliance.confirm.body: Marks the deletion as purged immediately. The 24h trash TTL already evaporated row-level data.
compliance.cancel.title: Cancel deletion?
backup.title: Backup + disaster recovery
backup.disabled.title: Backups are disabled
backup.disabled.body: Set BACKUP_ENABLED=true and provide B2 credentials in the environment to enable scheduled backups. See docs/runbooks/backup-and-restore.md for the operator runbook.
backup.summary.title: Status
backup.snapshots.title: Snapshots
backup.confirm.backupNow: Trigger an immediate backup? This runs mongodump + restic against the configured B2 bucket.
backup.confirm.restoreStaging: Restore this snapshot into a sandbox temp directory? Production data is NOT touched.
backup.empty.title: No snapshots yet
backup.empty.description: Trigger a manual backup or wait for the next scheduled run.
pricing.title: Pricing & VAT
pricing.vies.help: Verifies EU B2B VAT numbers and zero-rates intra-EU sales (reverse charge).
pricing.stripe.enabled: Use Stripe Tax for VAT calculation
pricing.enabledHelp: Pick the currencies you accept (empty = all supported)
pricing.vat.label: VAT
Change your password — you're using the: Change your password — you're using the seeded initial password.
and set a new password to clear this war: and set a new password to clear this warning.
No diff captured — this mutation did not: No diff captured — this mutation did not record before/after (or the diff exceeded the 10 kB cap).
AUTHOR: AUTHOR
Name: Name
This cannot be undone. Export first if u: This cannot be undone. Export first if unsure.
Download a single JSON file with your na: Download a single JSON file with your navigation, sections, languages, logo and all referenced images inlined as base64.
This replaces ALL site data and overwrit: This replaces ALL site data and overwrites files in public/images.
Must change password on next login: Must change password on next login
A new snapshot will be created pointing: A new snapshot will be created pointing at this version.
All pages stacked on one URL. Clicking a: All pages stacked on one URL. Clicking a nav item smooth-scrolls to the matching section; hash URLs stay shareable.
Allows copying the draft site state into: Allows copying the draft site state into the live published snapshot.
Author: Author
Avatar initial (defaults to first letter: Avatar initial (defaults to first letter of name)
Blog hidden from the public site: Blog hidden from the public site
Classic layout — clicking a nav item loa: Classic layout — clicking a nav item loads that page as its own URL.
Could not determine the uploaded image l: Could not determine the uploaded image location yet — try again.
Headline: Headline
Label: Label
Leave blank to auto-generate from the ti: Leave blank to auto-generate from the title.
No snapshots yet — use the Publish butto: No snapshots yet — use the Publish button in App building to create one.
Pick a preset to prefill, or enter your: Pick a preset to prefill, or enter your own below.
Pick how visitors move between pages. Bo: Pick how visitors move between pages. Both modes share the same content — only the render differs.
Renders in a 2-column grid — add in pair: Renders in a 2-column grid — add in pairs for an even layout.
Section title (wrap words in *asterisks*: Section title (wrap words in *asterisks* for italic accent)
Select a non-default language before sav: Select a non-default language before saving.
Shown next to the language name in the p: Shown next to the language name in the public menu dropdown.
Site-wide horizontal padding. Full-bleed: Site-wide horizontal padding. Full-bleed modules (hero with bg, image-as-background) break out.
Subtitle (used when no Titles list is se: Subtitle (used when no Titles list is set)
The logo appears at the far left of the: The logo appears at the far left of the public site header, next to the navigation. Choose an image then press Save.
Theme activated — reload to see changes: Theme activated — reload to see changes site-wide.
These defaults are used when a page has: These defaults are used when a page has no per-page SEO set. Per-page SEO (Navigation > page > SEO) always wins.
This copies the current draft to the liv: This copies the current draft to the live published snapshot.
Title: Title
Upload or pick a logo image: Upload or pick a logo image
permissions.preset.label: Role preset
permissions.preset.admin.label: Admin
permissions.preset.admin.description: Full access to everything in the workspace.
permissions.preset.designer.label: Designer
permissions.preset.designer.description: Full access to Pages + Themes; edit Posts + Products; view Orders + Customers.
permissions.preset.editor.label: Editor
permissions.preset.reviewer.label: Reviewer
permissions.preset.reviewer.description: Comment on Pages + Posts; view elsewhere (comments coming in a future release; behaves like View today).
permissions.preset.viewer.label: Viewer
permissions.preset.viewer.description: Read-only across the workspace. Recommended default for new users.
permissions.preset.custom.label: Custom
permissions.editor.title: Permissions — {{email}}
permissions.tierGrid.heading: Permissions by scope
permissions.overrides.heading: Per-resource overrides
permissions.overrides.empty: No overrides — tier covers everything in the scope.
permissions.custom.heading: Custom grants (advanced)
permissions.custom.legacyNote: Legacy per-action checkbox UI lives on the Users pane. The tier grid above replaces it for everyday use.
permissions.grantGrid.heading: Resource grants
permissions.grantGrid.help: Grant access to specific features, pages, and locales. Click a granted cell to see detail or revoke it. Changes save immediately.
Group N draft changes, preview together,: Group N draft changes, preview together, publish atomically.
Select a release to manage members: Select a release to manage members
Label: Label
No members yet — attach a draft above: No members yet — attach a draft above
All attached members will be written to: All attached members will be written to live atomically.
All members will revert to their pre-rel: All members will revert to their pre-release state via a new auto-published rollback release.
Title: Title
empty.posts.title: No posts yet
empty.posts.description: Write a post — announcements, articles, updates.
empty.themes.title: No themes yet
empty.themes.description: Activate a preset to set the look of your site.
empty.users.title: No team yet
empty.products.title: No products yet
empty.products.description: Add a product, or sync from an external warehouse.
empty.trash.title: Trash is empty
empty.trash.description: Deleted items appear here for 24 hours and then auto-purge.
empty.inquiries.title: No inquiries yet
empty.inquiries.description: Messages from your site's contact form show up here.
empty.orders.title: No orders yet
empty.orders.description: Orders show up here as customers buy.
empty.audit.title: No audit events yet
empty.audit.description: Changes you make to the site will appear here.
empty.errors.title: No errors recorded
empty.errors.description: If something goes wrong, you'll see it here.
notifications.stats.title: Notification preferences
notifications.stats.empty.title: No customer preference data yet
notifications.stats.empty.description: Customer notification routing breakdowns will appear here once customers sign up.
empty.languages.title: Default language only
empty.languages.description: Add languages to translate your site into.
empty.inventoryRuns.title: No sync runs yet
empty.inventoryRuns.description: Run a delta sync to pull product data from your warehouse.
empty.inventoryProducts.title: No products to stock
empty.inventoryProducts.description: Add a product on the Products pane first, then come back to set stock.
empty.onboarding.seedDescription: We'll create one page, one post, and one product so the admin isn't blank.
empty.mcpTokens.title: No tokens created yet
empty.mcpTokens.description: Issue a token so Claude, Cursor or any MCP client can edit your site.
empty.permissions.title: No team members yet
empty.permissions.description: Invite teammates first — then assign roles and tiers from this pane.
Saving {{collection}} fields from the ov: Saving {{collection}} fields from the overlay is not wired yet.
Section {{id}} not found in the loaded s: Section {{id}} not found in the loaded set.
Exact-path redirects consulted by the ed: Exact-path redirects consulted by the edge middleware before route resolution. Source paths must start with /. Targets can be relative or absolute.
Add a redirect when retiring a URL or re: Add a redirect when retiring a URL or restructuring your site.
emailTemplates.title: Email templates
emailTemplates.intro: Preview every transactional template against the bundled fixture, then send a test through the active provider. Templates are theme-aware — accent color, font, logo, and site name come from the active site theme.
emailTemplates.empty: Pick a template on the left to render a preview.
emailTemplates.sendTestHint: Sends a generic test email through the active provider to verify deliverability. Configure provider in System → Email.
cars.title: Cars
cars.res.confirm.title: Confirm deposit?
cars.res.cancel.title: Cancel reservation?
seoOverview.title: SEO overview
seoOverview.description: Aggregated SEO health for the site — sitemap counts, redirect-row count, OG-image coverage, and the latest pre-flight warnings.
seoOverview.empty.title: No data yet
seoOverview.empty.description: Press refresh to compute the SEO overview.
seoOverview.stats.ogCoverageDetail: {{covered}} of {{total}} pages have a custom og:image
seoOverview.noWarnings: No pre-flight warnings — every page passes the meta audit.
section.cannot.delete.locked: This section is required and cannot be deleted.
commerce.title: Commerce
commerce.checkoutEnabled.label: Enable checkout on this site
commerce.checkoutEnabled.help: When enabled, customers can add products to cart and complete checkout. Per-payment-provider toggles and flow customisation land in a follow-up.
commerce.master.info: Master switch for storefront commerce. When off, /checkout/* 404s, cart drawer is hidden, and Product modules render catalogue-only.
product.module.label: Product
product.module.description: Featured / grid / carousel / comparison / related — pick mode in editor.
product.editor.showBuyCta.help: Buy CTA only renders when commerce.checkoutEnabled is on. Catalogue-only sites can leave the toggle on safely.
cart.drawer.title: Your cart
section.locked.warehouse-derived: Auto-injected on a warehouse-derived page — section cannot be removed (reorder + edit content still allowed).
section.locked.product-detail: Transactional section on a product page — cannot be removed.
warehouseSync.title: Warehouse page sync
warehouseSync.description: Mirrors the upstream warehouse catalogue into the page tree. Cron runs every 5 min; trigger manually below.
warehouseSync.empty: No sync run yet this boot
breadcrumb.aria.label: Breadcrumb
accountSettings.typeSwitch.confirmBody: This will hide your company information. Your business addresses will be archived. Continue?
section.locked.account-settings-form: Active settings form — system-managed, dispatches by tab.
account.settings.title: Account settings
section.locked.product-hero: Product hero — system-managed; Buy CTA + VAT badge always render.
productTemplate.title: Product display templates
productTemplate.subtitle: Named section compositions you assign to products. Built-ins cannot be deleted — duplicate to customise.
productTemplate.cascadeNotice: Deleting cascades — all products using this template reset to the default.
systemPages.title: System pages
systemPages.subtitle: Framework-required pages (cart, checkout flow, order-by-token, account dashboard, magic-link verify). Operator edits to composable sections are preserved; locked transactional sections always remain.
section.locked.cart-line-items: Cart line items — system-managed; reflects the live cart.
section.locked.cart-summary: Cart summary — system-managed; subtotal / VAT / shipping / total.
section.locked.cart-actions: Cart actions — system-managed; Clear + Proceed CTAs.
section.locked.checkout-cart-summary: Checkout cart summary — system-managed read-only mini cart.
checkout.cart.title: Cart
checkout.address.title: Shipping address
checkout.shipping.title: Shipping method
checkout.payment.title: Payment
checkout.confirmation.title: Order confirmation
checkout.orderByToken.title: Your order
account.dashboard.title: Account
account.magicLinkVerify.title: Verify magic link
